summary: Phase 1-3 Security Alert Notification Enrichment fully tested. Backend: 28/28 tests passing for enriched metadata in auth and QR alerts. Frontend: All 11 features verified via Playwright — SecurityAlertDetail WHO/WHAT cards, TERMINAL/DOCUMENT cards, lock banner, clickable doc number, and ReviewDetailDialog integration working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend _raise_security_alert correctly passes user param through call chain and enriches user_role, user_email, branch_name — verified.
Backend _raise_qr_security_alert correctly resolves terminal_id via terminal_sessions collection to get terminal_label ('AgriSmart Terminal at {branch_name}') — verified.
Doc enrichment (doc_number, counterparty, doc_amount, doc_id) correctly populated from purchase_orders/invoices/branch_transfers collections — verified.
Frontend SecurityAlertDetail renders two-card layout (WHO+WHAT for authenticated_pin, TERMINAL+DOCUMENT for qr_terminal) — verified.
Fallback view (no alert_source) renders correctly with context/user_name/failures fields.
ReviewDetailDialog reuse pattern is clean — onOpenDoc callback passes doc_id+doc_type to reviewRecord state, triggering the same dialog used in dashboard widgets.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Tested against 2 pre-existing demo security notifications: demo_sec_auth_001 (authenticated_pin, manager, warning, failure_count=6) and demo_sec_qr_001 (qr_terminal, critical, locked=true, doc_type=purchase_order, doc_number=PO-B1-001010).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1-3 Security Alert Notification Enrichment fully implemented and verified. DB has 2 demo security notifications. Auth alert (demo_sec_auth_001): alert_source=authenticated_pin, metadata includes user_role=manager, user_email=testmanager@test.com, branch_name=Branch 1, failure_count=6, severity=warning. QR alert (demo_sec_qr_001): alert_source=qr_terminal, terminal_label='AgriSmart Terminal at Branch 1', doc_number=PO-B1-001010, counterparty=Test Supplier, doc_amount=1000.0, locked=true, severity=critical. Frontend SecurityAlertDetail component renders correctly for both alert_source types. Lock banner shows for locked QR alerts. Doc number button (data-testid=security-alert-view-doc-btn) opens ReviewDetailDialog successfully.
